commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows/removes timeout-sensitive Codex dynamic-tool tests, widens one MCP `tools/list` timing test, and raises undici from 8.3.0 to 8.5.0 across root/plugin manifests and locks.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests -170, Config 0, Other 0. Total -170 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR to stabilize timeout-sensitive tests and update a dependency floor, not a user bug report. I verified the changed tests map to current Codex registered-tool and MCP catalog-timeout source invariants, but did not run the timing flakes locally.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer label, draft state, and dependency validation make this a maintainer-review item rather than a cleanup close or automated repair job.

target.title: test(ci): stabilize timeout-sensitive shards
target.body:
## Summary

- Stabilizes timeout-sensitive hosted QA shards by removing synthetic Codex app-server run-attempt integrations that repeatedly wedged plugin prerelease shard 1, while keeping narrower dynamic-tool and thread-start config coverage.
- Replaces a slow registered-message schema test with direct policy invariant assertions and adjusts bundle MCP timeout timing.
- Refreshes root and Discord shrinkwraps after the current `undici` security floor landed on `main`.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/pre-commit/pnpm-audit-prod.mjs --audit-level=high`
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --all --check`
- Maintainer autoreview: clean, no actionable findings.
- CI run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27774571070: success on `8b623ba79d649e31bca88563bb8e5471b3b6d27e` (`security-fast`, `check-lint`, `check-shrinkwrap`, `macos-node`, `macos-swift`, `check-additional-extension-bundled`, `checks-node-compat-node22`, `checks-node-agentic-control-plane-startup-health-runtime`, `checks-node-agentic-agents-core-runtime`).
- Plugin prerelease run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27774571273: success on `8b623ba79d649e31bca88563bb8e5471b3b6d27e` (package-boundary compile/canary, inspector, live-ish availability, extension shards including `checks-node-extensions-shard-1`; Docker suite skipped because full release validation was not requested).

Local Vitest/check commands were not run in this sparse Codex worktree because it intentionally has no local deps; the hosted CI and plugin prerelease runs above are the proof for the touched surfaces.
target.author: vincentkoc
